description: Configure your Windows system according to security best practices

categories.title: 1. Account Policies
categories.description: User account and authentication security settings

items.title: Enforce password history
items.description: Ensure 'Enforce password history' is set to '24 or more password(s)'
references: CIS Microsoft Windows 10 Stand-alone Benchmark v4.0.0

items.title: Maximum password age
items.description: Ensure 'Maximum password age' is set to '90 days, but not 0'
references: CIS Microsoft Windows 10 Stand-alone Benchmark v4.0.0

items.title: Minimum password age
items.description: Ensure 'Minimum password age' is set to '1 day'
references: CIS Microsoft Windows 10 Stand-alone Benchmark v4.0.0

items.title: Minimum password length
items.description: Ensure 'Minimum password length' is set to '12 or more character(s)'
references: CIS Microsoft Windows 10 Stand-alone Benchmark v4.0.0

items.title: Password complexity requirements
items.description: Ensure 'Password must meet complexity requirements' is set to 'Enabled'
references: CIS Microsoft Windows 10 Stand-alone Benchmark v4.0.0

items.title: Store passwords using reversible encryption
items.description: Ensure 'Store passwords using reversible encryption' is set to 'Disabled'
references: CIS Microsoft Windows 10 Stand-alone Benchmark v4.0.0

metadata.source: CIS Microsoft Windows 10 Stand-alone Benchmark v4.0.0
